Localization.Name: Roberts Space Industries
Localization.Description: The original creators of the engine that kickstarted Humanity’s expansion into space, Roberts Space Industries builds a wide range of spaceships that serve all needs, from basic interstellar travel to deep exploration on the outer edges of the galaxy. The tagline is “Roberts Space Industries: Delivering the Stars since 2075”

AttachDef.Tags: DeckCrew Set_01 Color_13 SM_RestrictedArm Helmet HelmetCarryable

Localization.Name: Horizon Helmet Dark Red
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Light Armor
Damage Reduction: 20%
Temp. Rating: -37 / 67 °C
Radiation Protection: 26000 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s

RSI's Horizon helmet is a durable and robust environmental enclosed work helmet. The single sheet laminate dome gives you an extremely wide field of view. A pair of side-mounted LED light modules provide additional illumination to make sure you can see what you're doing.
